mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sale_order_item ( sale_order_id, medicine_id, batch_no, quantity, sale_price, subtotal ) VALUES
( #{item.saleOrderId}, #{item.medicineId}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.salePrice}, #{item.subtotal} )
mapper.select: SELECT soi.id, soi.medicine_id, m.medicine_name, soi.batch_no, soi.quantity, soi.sale_price, soi.subtotal FROM sale_order_item soi INNER JOIN medicine m ON soi.medicine_id = m.id WHERE soi.sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} ORDER BY soi.id ASC
